name: Story - Self Progress
description: Parallel personal-story developments for character generation. Results are filtered by thread key in code.

results.description: The inheritance dispute began costing you chances directly, as others weighed your prospects against unfinished family claims.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: A letter, witness, or rumor revived the inheritance matter just when it seemed safe to treat it as someone else's burden.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: You found that people could be cordial to you and still calculate around the unresolved inheritance at the same time.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: What should have come to you or your branch of the family kept being delayed by persons who insisted delay was only prudence.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: The old feud reached you through insult, exclusion, or needless resistance from people who had decided your surname was argument enough.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: You were forced to discover how much of the feud had become habit in others long before it ever became choice in you.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: What began as inherited hostility became your own practical problem once the feud started closing doors that should have stayed open.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: A small slight against you acquired the weight of family history so quickly that it was clear the quarrel had only been waiting for a new name.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: The patron's earlier favor ripened into expectation, and your compliance began being measured before it was requested.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: You were reminded that old protection creates very modern obligations once your own life becomes useful to somebody powerful.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: A request made in a patron's name showed clearly that your freedom now included the freedom to disappoint someone dangerous.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: The patron's goodwill began being spoken of as if it were a debt you had not yet finished paying, which sharpened every favor afterward.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: The buried scandal brushed your own name more openly, and you learned how quickly politeness changes once rumor acquires detail.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: Someone repeated enough of the old scandal to harm you while still keeping enough back to make denial look uncertain.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: A matter once kept inside the family began shaping your introductions, opportunities, and excuses in public.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: The scandal lingered in the faces of people meeting you for the first time, as if someone had prepared them in advance.
results.name: buried-scandal
